education_normalized.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Aerospace Engineering

work_experience_normalized.description: Primary contact between Boeing Commercial Airplanes and Safran Cabin Engineering, responsible for technical communications regarding product configuration, qualification programs, certification of galley equipment (per Boeing d6-36075/d6-36075-1) and all aspects of engineering issues.

Led the review of engineering change requests within Change Control Board (CCB) to dampen implementation process and optimize change impact on the overall system, coordinated with internal stakeholders for fast approval process turnaround time, reviewed product configuration for transmission of Engineering Change Work Packages.

Demonstrated compliance of aircraft galley equipment design to airworthiness requirements, conducted certification testing and analysis, created certification and qualification documents in line with Safran internal procedures.
Conducted preliminary design review, manufacturability assessment and design of casting process for automotive subframes, steering knuckles and control arms.
Participated in design and development of the long-range UAV for smart farming application, involved in aerodynamic design and optimization, design for composite manufacturing process.

Participated in the study of vibrational behavior (modal analysis) of aircraft structures in variation of assembly configurations, activities included construction of test specimens, experimental setup and instrument calibration for data acquisition.

work_experience_normalized.company: Department of Fluid Dynamics and Thermodynamics, CTU in Prague
work_experience_normalized.description: Designed and optimized wing planform and truss-type fuselage of the two-seater ultralight aircraft, took part in the assessment of characteristics of small UAS propellers using image processing.

international_experience_normalized.institution_or_company: Department of Fluid Dynamics and Thermodynamics, CTU in Prague

hard_skills: Cabin Safety Course (Advanced Certification) CS-25 Large Aeroplanes
